sizing_rule.note: Optimal f applied to normal distribution truncated at 3–5 sigmas from mean (99.73% coverage). Divide truncated range into equally spaced data points for parametric position sizing. Specific optimal f value not provided by author.

source_rule_text: When applying parametric optimal f to a normal distribution, truncate the distribution at 3 to 5 standard deviations from the mean to encompass 99.73% of trading activity, then divide this range into equally spaced data points for position sizing calculations.
